title: Add NovAI to bots
author: pollinations-ai[bot]
pr_body_excerpt:
- Adds [NovAI](https://nov-ai.github.io/) to bots
- NovAI integrates Pollinations AI with Discord as an open-source project. It enables AI features via Discord.

Fixes #12053

gist.headline: NovAI joins the greenhouse
gist.blurb: NovAI just landed in the Greenhouse! This open-source project brings Pollinations AI directly into your Discord servers.
gist.summary: Added NovAI, an open-source Discord integration, to the community apps directory and Greenhouse.
gist.impact: Users can now discover and deploy NovAI to bring Pollinations-powered AI features directly into their Discord communities.
gist.visual_concept: The Pollinations bee (Polly) welcoming a cute chat-bot robot into a lush, cozy greenhouse filled with glowing plants, representing the new Discord bot integration.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot flying inside a warm, glowing greenhouse, handing a glowing lime green (#ecf874) flower to a chunky retro robot with a chat bubble on its screen. Soft pastel gradient background with lush pixelated plants. Warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Cozy pixel art, 8-bit aesthetic, chunky sprites, emotionally warm.

image.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot flying inside a warm, glowing greenhouse, handing a glowing lime green (#ecf874) flower to a chunky retro robot with a chat bubble on its screen.
